title: The Partnership (The Citadel)
description: The Quinta Essentia: Full architecture partnership where I become the Architect of your Citadel. I must align with your vision. You will not utilize my methods on a fractured foundation.

title: The Citadel System Installation
description: The TERRA Blueprint: System installation of The HELM (HR/Culture) and The BRIDGE (Sales/Marketing) systems. You implement the Great Work with my direct training.

title: The Spark Diagnostic & Blueprint
description: The AQUA Solvent: A mandatory diagnostic to identify your core operational fractures (Porta Doloris) and deliver your custom strategic blueprint.
